title: Coherence User Configuration
description: User-authorable settings for the Coherence extension (~/.copilot/coherence.json). Runtime-only fields such as configPath are excluded. All paths.* values default to paths derived from the user home directory at runtime and should not be set here unless you need to override them.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference URI. Stripped at load time and never treated as a config key.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Coherence extension. Can also be controlled via the COHERENCE_ENABLED environment variable, which takes precedence over this field.

paths.description: Override default file-system paths used by Coherence. All values are strings. Defaults are derived from the user home directory at runtime and are environment-specific, so only set these when you need a non-default layout.

copilotHome.description: Base directory for Copilot CLI data. Runtime default: ~/.copilot

rawStorePath.description: Path to the raw session-store SQLite database. Runtime default: <copilotHome>/session-store.db

derivedStorePath.description: Path to the derived Coherence SQLite database. Runtime default: <copilotHome>/coherence.db

backupDir.description: Directory for Coherence database backups. Runtime default: <copilotHome>/backups/coherence

instructionsPath.description: Path to the global Copilot instructions markdown file. Runtime default: <copilotHome>/copilot-instructions.md

scopedInstructionsDir.description: Directory containing per-pattern instruction files. Runtime default: <copilotHome>/instructions

budgets.description: Token budgets for the different memory capsule categories injected into the context window.

procedural.description: Token budget for procedural (rule and preference) memory.

episodes.description: Token budget for episodic memory (prior session excerpts).

commitments.description: Token budget for commitment and goal memory.

total.description: Overall token budget cap across all memory categories combined.

limits.description: Row and result limits for memory retrieval queries.

semanticSearchLimit.description: Maximum number of semantic memory entries returned per retrieval query.

episodeSearchLimit.description: Maximum number of episode entries returned per retrieval query.

promptContextLimit.description: Maximum number of memory entries injected into the prompt context per request.

crossRepoPreferenceLimit.description: Maximum number of cross-repository preference memories to surface when local recall is weak.

crossRepoEpisodeLimit.description: Maximum number of cross-repository episode memories to surface when local recall is weak.

metricWindowSize.description: Rolling window size in sessions used for latency and quality metric calculations.

recentSessionsFallbackLimit.description: Number of recent sessions to include as fallback context when targeted recall returns nothing useful.

latencyTargetsMs.description: P95 latency targets in milliseconds for key Coherence lifecycle hooks. Coherence will emit warnings when observed latency exceeds these thresholds.

sessionStartP95.description: P95 latency target in milliseconds for the session-start hook.

userPromptSubmittedP95.description: P95 latency target in milliseconds for the user-prompt-submitted hook.

latencyReadinessMinSamples.description: Minimum sample counts required before latency readiness checks become active. Checks are skipped until the sample threshold is met to avoid false positives during warm-up.

sessionStart.description: Minimum number of session-start samples before P95 latency checks are enforced.

userPromptSubmitted.description: Minimum number of user-prompt-submitted samples before P95 latency checks are enforced.

deferredExtraction.description: Settings for the background memory-extraction pipeline that runs between sessions.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the deferred extraction pipeline entirely.

autoEnqueueOnSessionEnd.description: Automatically enqueue sessions for memory extraction when they end.

autoProcessOnSessionStart.description: Automatically process queued extraction jobs when a new session starts.

processCurrentRepositoryOnly.description: When processing queued jobs, restrict extraction to the current repository only.

maxJobsPerRun.description: Maximum number of extraction jobs to process in a single run.

retryDelayMinutes.description: Minutes to wait before retrying a failed extraction job.

maintenanceScheduler.description: Local-first maintenance scheduler settings. The scheduler runs bounded upkeep opportunistically during local sessions or explicit script/tool invocations rather than as an always-on daemon.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the maintenance scheduler entirely. Default-off keeps the new upkeep path rollback-safe until explicitly turned on.

autoRunOnSessionStart.description: When true, allow the local scheduler to evaluate and run due maintenance tasks opportunistically at session start.

maxTasksPerRun.description: Maximum number of maintenance tasks that may run in a single sweep. This cap keeps automatic upkeep bounded.

validationCaseLimit.description: Maximum number of validation corpus cases to execute in one maintenance sweep. Cases rotate over time using a persisted cursor.

replayCaseLimit.description: Maximum number of replay corpus cases to execute in one maintenance sweep. Cases rotate over time using a persisted cursor.

backlogReviewLimit.description: Maximum number of stale improvement backlog artifacts to surface in one maintenance review.

backlogStaleAfterHours.description: Treat active improvement backlog artifacts older than this many hours as stale during maintenance review.

tasks.description: Per-task enable flags for the local maintenance scheduler.

validationCorpus.description: Allow scheduled bounded validation corpus runs.

replayCorpus.description: Allow scheduled bounded replay corpus runs.

backlogReview.description: Allow scheduled stale backlog review and status summaries.

traceCompaction.description: Allow optional trace-recorder compaction. This only runs when the trace recorder rollout is enabled.

indexUpkeep.description: Allow optional SQLite index upkeep such as PRAGMA optimize and a passive WAL checkpoint.

taskCadenceMinutes.description: Per-task minimum cadence in minutes. A value of 0 means the task is due every eligible maintenance sweep.

validationCorpus.description: Cadence for bounded validation corpus runs.

replayCorpus.description: Cadence for bounded replay corpus runs.

indexUpkeep.description: Cadence for optional SQLite index upkeep.

traceRecorder.description: Bounded in-memory settings for optional prompt/session trace capture. These caps keep the recorder rollback-safe and cheap to disable.

maxRecords.description: Maximum number of recent trace records to retain in memory before evicting the oldest entries.

maxAgeMs.description: Maximum age in milliseconds for retained trace records before they expire from the in-memory recorder.

maxRowsPerLookup.description: Maximum number of matched and included rows to retain per lookup inside a recorded trace.

maxFilteredRowsPerLookup.description: Maximum number of dropped/filtered rows to retain per lookup inside a recorded trace.

maxPromptChars.description: Maximum number of prompt-preview characters stored for a recorded trace.

maxRowChars.description: Maximum number of row-summary characters stored for matched, included, or filtered lookup samples.

maxContextChars.description: Maximum number of generated-context characters stored per recorded trace.

rollout.description: Feature flags for experimental or opt-in Coherence capabilities.

ambientPersonaMode.description: Enable ambient persona mode, where Coherence proactively applies style and tone preferences without explicit prompting.

autoWriteImprovementGoals.description: Enable automatic writing of improvement goals to the instructions file based on session observations.

memoryOperations.description: Enable the explicit Phase 1 memory-operations boundary. When false, runtime prompt recall falls back to the legacy prompt-context path.

workstreamOverlays.description: Enable workstream overlay retain/recall behavior. When false, persisted overlay rows are ignored by runtime recall.

temporalQueryNormalization.description: Enable the richer temporal-query normalization used by prompt-time recall.

retentionSanitization.description: Strip injected Coherence context from retained transcripts before extraction and explicit retain writes.

traceRecorder.description: Enable the optional bounded trace recorder used to inspect prompt-need classification, lookup outcomes, injected context, and router-ready decisions.

evolutionLedger.description: Enable the additive Phase 5 evolution-ledger surfaces that summarize review-gated improvement artifacts and manual signals.

proposalGeneration.description: Enable generation of review-gated proposal artifacts under extensions/coherence/docs/proposals during explicit tool calls or maintenance backlog review.

generatedArtifactIntegrity.description: Enable explicit verification and repair of generated proposal artifacts and indexes instead of silently tolerating drift.
